name: yank
description: Pulls the slack out of WhatsApp.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/shared packages/db && pnpm -r run typecheck
scripts.dev: concurrently -n daemon,api,web -c magenta,green,blue --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm --filter @yank/daemon dev" "pnpm --filter @yank/api dev" "pnpm --filter @yank/web dev"
